###############################################################################
#  KEYBINDINGS — leftwm
#  Source: etc/skel/.config/leftwm/config.ron + etc/skel/.config/leftwm/sxhkd/sxhkdrc
#  Generated: 2026.06.30 by /kiro-keybindings-all — DO NOT EDIT BY HAND
###############################################################################

── 1. Applications & Launchers ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + Return            alacritty (terminal)
  super + t                 alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + Return       alacritty (terminal)
  ctrl + alt + t            alacritty (terminal)
  super + KP_Enter          alacritty (terminal)
  F12                       xfce4-terminal (drop-down terminal)
  ctrl + alt + End          alacritty -e btop (system monitor)
  super + shift + Return    thunar (file manager)
  super + F8                thunar (file manager)
  super + shift + KP_Enter  thunar (file manager)
  ctrl + alt + b            brave (browser)
  ctrl + alt + c            chromium (browser)
  super + d                 launcher.sh (rofi launcher)
  super + shift + d         dmenu_run (app launcher)
  super + F11               rofi -show drun (fullscreen)
  super + F12               rofi -show drun
  super + r                 rofi-theme-selector
  alt + r                   rofi-theme-selector
  super + e                 code (VS Code)
  super + F2                code (VS Code)
  super + ctrl + s          kiro-keybindings
  ctrl + alt + e            archlinux-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + d            obs
  ctrl + alt + p            pamac-manager (package manager)
  ctrl + alt + m            mintstick (USB image writer)
  ctrl + alt + ,            mintstick (USB image writer)
  ctrl + alt + a            alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + q            alacritty-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + z            fastfetch-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + w            fastfetch-tweak-tool
  ctrl + alt + s            fish-tweak-tool
  alt + F2                  xfce4-appfinder (collapsed)
  alt + F3                  xfce4-appfinder
  ctrl + shift + Escape     xfce4-taskmanager
  super + F1                vivaldi-stable (browser)
  ctrl + alt + v            vivaldi-stable (browser)
  ctrl + alt + g            chromium (browser)
  ctrl + alt + o            opera
  ctrl + alt + i            kiro-iso-builder (ISO builder)
  ctrl + alt + f            firefox (browser)
  super + F3                inkscape
  super + F4                gimp
  super + F5                meld
  super + F6                vlc --video-on-top
  super + F7                virtualbox
  super + F9                virt-manager (virtual machine manager)
  super + m                 lollypop (music player)
  super + F10               spotify

── 2. Window Management ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + q                 close focused window
  super + shift + q         close focused window
  super + f                 toggle fullscreen
  super + k                 focus next window
  super + j                 focus previous window
  super + shift + k         move window in stack (up)
  super + shift + j         move window in stack (down)
  super + shift + Up        move window in stack (up)
  super + shift + Down      move window in stack (down)
  super + Escape            xkill (force-kill a window)
  super + shift + Escape    xkill (force-kill a window)

── 3. Workspaces / Tags / Groups ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + 1..9              switch to tag N
  super + shift + 1..9      send window to tag N
  super + Down              focus next tag
  super + Up                focus previous tag
  super + Tab               focus next tag
  super + shift + Tab       focus previous tag
  alt + Tab                 focus next tag
  alt + shift + Tab         focus previous tag
  ctrl + alt + Right        focus next tag
  ctrl + alt + Left         focus previous tag
  ctrl + alt + Down         focus next tag
  ctrl + alt + Up           focus previous tag
  super + w                 swap tags
  super + shift + w         move to last workspace

── 4. Layout & Tiling ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + space             next layout
  super + shift + space     previous layout
  super + ctrl + Up         next layout
  super + ctrl + Down       previous layout

── 5. Multi-monitor ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + Left              swap screens
  super + Right             swap screens
  super + l                 focus next workspace
  super + h                 focus previous workspace
  super + shift + Left      move window to next workspace
  super + shift + Right     move window to next workspace

── 6. Multimedia & Hardware ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  XF86AudioRaiseVolume      volume +10% (pamixer)
  XF86AudioLowerVolume      volume -10% (pamixer)
  XF86AudioMute             toggle mute
  XF86AudioPlay             play / pause (playerctl)
  XF86AudioNext             next track (playerctl)
  XF86AudioPrev             previous track (playerctl)
  XF86AudioStop             stop (playerctl)
  XF86MonBrightnessUp       brightness +10 (xbacklight)
  XF86MonBrightnessDown     brightness -10 (xbacklight)
  super + v                 pavucontrol (audio mixer)
  ctrl + alt + u            pavucontrol (audio mixer)
  alt + t                   variety: trash wallpaper
  alt + n                   variety: next wallpaper
  alt + p                   variety: previous wallpaper
  alt + f                   variety: favorite wallpaper
  alt + Left                variety: previous wallpaper
  alt + Right               variety: next wallpaper
  alt + Up                  variety: pause slideshow
  alt + Down                variety: resume slideshow
  super + ctrl + space      variety: wallpaper selector
  alt + shift + t           variety: trash wallpaper + pywal
  alt + shift + n           variety: next wallpaper + pywal
  alt + shift + p           variety: previous wallpaper + pywal
  alt + shift + f           variety: favorite wallpaper + pywal
  alt + shift + u           pywal: update colors from wallpaper

── 7. Screenshots ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Print                     scrot full screen → Pictures
  ctrl + Print              xfce4-screenshooter
  ctrl + shift + Print      gnome-screenshot (interactive)
  super + ctrl + Print      flameshot gui

── 8. System & Session ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  super + x                 archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + k            archlinux-logout
  ctrl + alt + l            archlinux-logout (settings)
  ctrl + alt + r            archlinux-betterlockscreen (lock screen)
  super + shift + x         edu-powermenu
  super + shift + r         reload leftwm
  super + shift + s         reload sxhkd
  super + y                 toggle polybar
  super + g                 toggle compositor (fastcompmgr)
